packageRules.description: One PR per dep — matches existing per-dependency Linear-ticket cadence
Auto-merge patch updates for GitHub Actions and Docker base images (low-risk regardless of version)
Auto-merge patch updates for stable (v1.0.0+) cargo and npm dependencies. Pre-v1.0 (0.x.y) deps stay manual — SemVer isn't binding below 1.0 and Rust/npm 0.x patches can include behavioural changes

Pin rand_core_06 cargo alias at v0.6 — the alias name explicitly documents the deliberate version pin (v0.6 API is required by a transitive crypto consumer). Any bump silently breaks the pin intent and gets closed manually (see PR #122). Revisit if the alias is removed from Cargo.toml
